cleavage agent: digested with trypsin (Sequencing grade modified trypsin, Promega)
enrichment method: enriched using the polyethylene glycol (PEG) precipitation protocol
fractionation method: cleaned by a strata-X-C-cartridge (Polymeric SCX, Phenomenex)
instrument: using a hybrid LTQ-Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer
ionization type: installed on to the nano electrospray ionization (NSI) source
labeling: the phage was amplified, concentrated and analysed using mass spectrometry.
